code: import React,{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{Line}from'react-chartjs-2';import{Chart as ChartJS,CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Legend}from'chart.js';import{getLogs}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";ChartJS.register(CategoryScale,LinearScale,PointElement,LineElement,Title,Tooltip,Legend);function EmissionChart(){const[logs,setLogs]=useState([]);useEffect(()=>{const fetchLogs=async()=>{try{const response=await getLogs();setLogs(response.data);}catch(error){console.error('Error fetching logs:',error);}};fetchLogs();},[]);const data={labels:logs.map(log=>log.timestamp),datasets:[{label:'CO₂ Emissions',data:logs.map(log=>log.emission),borderColor:'rgb(75, 192, 192)',tension:0.1}]};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{children:"Emission Chart"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(Line,{data:data})]});}export default EmissionChart;
